Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backorder updates, pre-populated with the relevant part status and estimated resolution details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Customer-facing updates are drafted automatically, cutting communication prep time dramatically and ensuring customers are proactively informed without manual effort.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all two-piece rotors listed.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitive catalog data from three sources in minutes rather than days of manual research, giving DFC a complete market view instantly.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify coverage matches and catalog gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Immediately reveals where DFC has competitive coverage and where product gaps exist, directly informing inventory and sourcing decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to target customers to gather demand data on the identified vehicle fitments and missing catalog coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real demand signals from customers without manual outreach effort, validating which catalog gaps are worth prioritizing for inventory investment.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted master reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Dino receives a single, clean, decision-ready output combining competitive data and demand validation, enabling faster and more confident catalog expansion decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad campaigns to retrieve the full ad copy, headlines, descriptions, and creative text fields across every live ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the complete active ad library in one automated pull, making it possible to audit every piece of copy without manually opening individual ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Analyzes all retrieved ad copy to detect and flag any instances of the specified phrases, noting the exact ad, field, and matched text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers precise, field-level flagging across hundreds of ads in seconds, ensuring compliance or quality issues are caught without any manual copy review.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured report listing every flagged ad with the campaign name, ad ID, field type, and the exact copy where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Stakeholders receive an immediately actionable audit report on demand, enabling fast response to compliance risks or messaging issues without digging through ad platforms manually.

summary: The AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 53 total agents across the board — 24 completed, 9 in progress, and 20 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline remains steady heading into the next push. The team's focus stays on advancing the 9 in-progress agents toward completion, with a packed planned queue ready to follow. Great work to everyone keeping the momentum going — more updates to come as things move forward!
